name: D-Scanner
effect: Must be equipped to digivolve your partner. Glows when wild or hostile Digimon are within 6 spaces. As a Free Action, scan one visible enemy to learn their Attribute and Element. As a Basic Action, perform a deep scan on one visible enemy to learn their Attribute, Element, and one combat stat of your choice. The D-Scanner supports digivolution up to Mega stage. Compatible with Spirit items — required to use any Legendary Spirit your Tamer carries.
notes: Required to use Legendary Spirits. Cap: Mega. Free Action: Attribute + Element. Basic Action: deep scan + 1 combat stat.
